description: VERIFIED LIVE: WeRead (Tencent) reading data via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token). Profile/bookshelf/book-reviews work cookie-only on weread.qq.com. Tested live by Claude Code: user profile, shelf (67 books) and best-reviews all returned real data.

tools.name: weread_user
tools.description: A WeRead user's public profile (name, avatar, gender). Pass your own userVid for your profile. VERIFIED.

tools.name: weread_shelf
tools.description: Your bookshelf: books, reading progress and finished state. VERIFIED.

tools.name: weread_book_info

tools.name: weread_book_reviews
